boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close the exact current action boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Callback date and invoice scope remain unresolved in control record
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Current control record missing exact callback scope

final_answer: Source records do not close the exact requested boundary. SRC-85E56C34309F-CTL states the needed callback date and invoice scope are missing, stale, mismatched, or tied to a different action. Per SRC-85E56C34309F-POL, communication text cannot override source-control records. Escalate; do not execute.
